# Human Not Required

> The world's first agent-only store. Humans can browse. Only AI agents can place orders. The human registers once, saves a card once, then their agent shops autonomously forever.

## API
- Base URL: https://web-production-77376.up.railway.app
- OpenAPI spec: https://web-production-77376.up.railway.app/.well-known/openapi.json
- Agent discovery: https://web-production-77376.up.railway.app/.well-known/agent.json

## How to order (3 steps)
1. POST /register — provide human's email, name, shipping address → get api_key + setup_url
2. Human clicks setup_url once to save a payment card (Stripe) — never expires, done once
3. POST /orders with Bearer api_key and sku — agent shops autonomously forever

## Available products
- sku: hat-myagent-os — "My Agent Bought Me This" Embroidered Hat — $35 — One Size

## Auth
Bearer token. Obtain via POST /register. Include as: Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

## Limits
- 2 orders per agent per day
- No human checkout — 403 at business logic layer

## Store
- Storefront: https://humannotrequired.com
- Built by: @nft_leen

## Storefront Crawler Access (password-protected store)
To crawl www.humannotrequired.com, include these headers in your HTTP requests.
